leadText: The Sticker Case (Japanese: シールいれ Seal Container), formatted Seal Case prior to Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl, is a Key Item introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Sticker Case allows the player to buy, collect, and apply Stickers to Ball Capsules .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt A case for storing Seals that can be applied to the capsule cases of Poké Balls. HG SS B W B2 W2 A case for storing Seals that can be applied to the Capsule cases of Poké Balls. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh LA A case for storing Seals that can be applied to the exteriors of Poké Balls. BD SP S V A case for storing Stickers that can be applied to Ball Capsules.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V N/A N/A Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Sticker Case allows the player to buy, collect, and apply Stickers to Ball Capsules . Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt A case for storing Seals that can be applied to the capsule cases of Poké Balls. HG SS B W B2 W2 A case for storing Seals that can be applied to the Capsule cases of Poké Balls. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh LA A case for storing Seals that can be applied to the exteriors of Poké Balls. BD SP S V A case for storing Stickers that can be applied to Ball Capsules. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method D P Pt Solaceon Town (gift from a woman) HG SS Moomoo Farm (gift for healing the sick Miltank ) While the Sticker Case's name was changed in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl to match the change from Seals to Stickers , it was never obtainable. Stickers can be accessed directly from the menu or the PC .
